description_long: This house is a modern residential structure set within a landscaped lot featuring a circular driveway and surrounded by a variety of trees and shrubs. The building itself has a flat roof and a geometric, angular design with multiple interconnected volumes, some of which are clad in dark and light materials. The property includes a paved driveway leading to a garage or carport area, and the main entrance is accentuated by a small porch or overhang. Large windows are visible on several sides, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The surrounding environment is open, with a mix of mature and young trees, and the house is set back from a main road, offering privacy and a sense of seclusion.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with geometric forms, large windows, and a landscaped lot with a circular driveway and surrounding trees.
description_view_0: From this view, the house is seen from the front, showcasing the circular driveway, main entrance, and the landscaped approach with trees lining the property.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the side of the house, revealing the garage or carport area and the continuation of the driveway, with more trees visible in the background.
description_view_2: The rear of the house is visible here, showing the flat roof and the arrangement of the building's volumes, as well as the density of trees behind the property.
description_view_3: This perspective provides a look at the opposite side of the house, emphasizing the driveway's connection to the main road and the distribution of trees around the lot.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch or overhang, steps, and a prominent door, integrated into the geometric facade.
